title: Highest temperature in Milan on June 12?
description:
This market will resolve to the temperature range that contains the highest temperature recorded at the Malpensa Intl Airport Station in degrees Celsius on 12 Jun '26.

The resolution source for this market will be information from Wunderground, specifically the highest temperature recorded for all times on this day for the Malpensa Intl Airport Station, available here: https://www.wunderground.com/history/daily/it/milan/LIMC.

To toggle between Fahrenheit and Celsius, click the gear icon next to the search bar and switch the Temperature setting between °F and °C.

This market can not resolve until the first data point for the following date has been published on the resolution source.

The resolution source for this market measures temperatures to whole degrees Celsius (eg, 9°C). Thus, this is the level of precision that will be used when resolving the market.

Revisions to temperatures recorded within this market's timeframe will be considered until the first datapoint for the following date has been published, after which any alterations will not be considered.

eventMetadata.context_description: Current numerical weather prediction ensembles from major global models indicate highest temperatures in Milan on June 12 most likely near 26–27 °C under typical early-summer high-pressure conditions over the Po Valley. Weak southerly flow and limited daytime heating from partial cloud cover are expected to cap extremes, consistent with the climatological average high of roughly 27 °C for mid-June. Recent model runs show minimal spread around these values, with little evidence of stronger subtropical air advection that would push readings into the upper 20s or low 30s. Market-implied odds therefore concentrate on 26–28 °C outcomes, reflecting traders’ integration of the latest deterministic and ensemble guidance ahead of any final observational adjustments on the day.
